docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BOOTH, NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOOTH, NICOLE AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOOTH, NICOLE
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF BOOTH, NICOLE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-17-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOOTH, NICOLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
